visual: Stands feet shoulder-width, arms rise slowly to shoulder height then press down to waist — the opening posture of the form.
motion_description: The practitioner stands with feet shoulder-width apart and knees slightly bent, maintaining evenly distributed weight. Both arms rise slowly and continuously forward to shoulder height with palms facing down. The arms then bend slightly at the elbows and smoothly press down to waist level. Throughout the entire motion, the torso remains entirely forward-facing.
